nodes.name: invoice.json
nodes.summary: Provides a complete sample invoice payload for DOCX rendering, including invoice metadata, customer details, repeatable line items, and a formatted total.

nodes.name: pptx-status.json
nodes.summary: Supplies project metadata and milestone records used to demonstrate placeholder replacement and repeated-slide generation in a PPTX status deck.

nodes.name: status-report.json
nodes.summary: Defines the sample project status-report payload used by the styled DOCX example, with nested project and owner values, milestone rows, and an optional risk note.
